name: Impossible Seafood Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Cream cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate (10 x 11/2 inch).
3. Mix crabmeat, cheeses, onions, and pimiento in the pie plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients smooth with a blender for 15 seconds or a hand beater for 1 minute.
5. Pour mixture into the plate.
6. Bake until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean (35 to 40 minutes).
7. Allow cooling for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Alternatively, use 1 can (6 oz) of drained crabmeat or shrimp removed from cartilage, or 1 can (4 1/2 oz) of well-rinsed and drained shrimp as a substitution.
